profiles.name: Charge
profiles.abilities: AT(2), Can only be used with a Charge order

profiles.name: Charge
profiles.abilities: AT(3), Can only be used with a Charge order

weapons.name: Models in Exo-armor can only receive equipment marked with ᴱ.

equipment.name: Ancestor relicᴱ
equipment.description:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army.

equipment.name: Bastium void armor
equipment.description: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Darkstar alloyᴱ
equipment.description: One melee weapon of the model gains Deadly(5+).

equipment.name: Quake Multigeneratorᴱ
equipment.description: One ranged weapon of the model gains Suppression.

equipment.name: Exo-armor
equipment.description: The model gains +1 Toughness, +1 Attack, 2+ armor save, 5+ invulnerable save, and the abilities "Massive(1)," "Shock Troops," and "Unyielding." Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Forgewrought armor
equipment.description: The model gains a 2+ save.

equipment.name: Forgewrought weaponᴱ
equipment.description: The model may re-roll one to hit roll per activation. Must be purchased for each weapon seperately.

equipment.name: Marksman honoursᴱ
equipment.description: The model gains +1 Ballistic skill.

equipment.name: Mass driver acceleratorsᴱ
equipment.description: After finishing a charge move, the enemy unit suffers one automatic wound with S:4 AP:0 D:1 for every friendly model that made it into base contact.

equipment.name: Psychic trainingᴱ
equipment.description: The model knows one additional psychic power from one of their chosen psychic disciplines. If it already knows all powers from each discipline, it may instead learn one power from a new discipline it has access to. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: RAM shieldᴱ
equipment.description: The model gains "Parry".

equipment.name: Rampart crest
equipment.description: The model and its accompanied unit gain a 5+ invulnerability save. Limit one crest per model.

equipment.name: Skimmer bike
equipment.description: The model gains +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound, a Magna-coil autogun, the ability "Jet bike" and "Vanguard". Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Swordsman honoursᴱ
equipment.description: The model gains +1 Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Teleportation crestᴱ
equipment.description: The model gains the "Deep Strike" ability. Limit one crest per model.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beaconᴱ
equipment.description: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Trophyᴱ
equipment.description: The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

equipment.name: Wayfarer's graceᴱ
equipment.description: The model gains "Regeneration(1)". Unique.

equipment.name: Weavefield crest
equipment.description: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save. Limit one crest per model.

equipment.name: Weavefield crest (Exo)ᴱ
equipment.description: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save. Limit one crest per model. Exo-armor only.

equipment.name: Models in Exo-armor can only receive equipment marked with ᴱ.
VEHICLE EQUIPMENT
equipment.description: VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT

equipment.name: Accelerated engine
equipment.description: Instead of shooting, the model can use its accelerated engine and can move aditionally 3". The vehicle has to pass a dangerous terrain test.

equipment.name: Additional void armor
equipment.description: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Ancestor’s jugdement warhead
equipment.description: The model gains an Ancestor's judgement warhead.

equipment.name: Improved targeting scanner
equipment.description: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons for all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Jammer
equipment.description: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deepstrike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

equipment.name: Refined power cores
equipment.description: The model gains +2" Movement.

equipment.name: Smoke Launcher
equipment.description:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.
